name: Tomato Verde Con Questo (Green Tomatoes with Cheese)
recipeIngredient: 10 oz can Mexican green tomatoes, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the onions and garlic; sauté until the onions are tender.
3. Add the tomatoes, chilies, coriander, salt, and pepper to taste.
4. Simmer gently for 10 minutes without covering the pan.
5. Add the cream cheese; stir until it begins to melt.
6. Add the heavy cream and cook just long enough to heat through.
